text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The holiday season is fast approaching. Haru
Urara loves fun get-togethers, so she's been
waiting for this time of year for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's that time of year again! I wanna throw a
party!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
One, two. One, two... We can eat a big carrot
cake during the holidays, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I need the holidays to come now... Oh! I know!
Can't we just add another holiday to the season?!
Like today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant.. sigh... I wanna meet Santa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting to reward her for working so
hard lately. So, as a present to her, I...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wowie, wowie, WOW! It's so cool! A real holiday
party!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You set up all of this yourself, Trainer? That's
incredible! Oh, it's so cute!
choice_data_list: Santa also gave me a present for you.
Santa also gave me a present for you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: REALLY?! Yay! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy! Yippee! Do you think he knows how happy I am?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, great!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So you're friends with Santa? Of course you would
be!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You should bring him to the academy! I want to
thank him directly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, that reminds me! Um, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The holidays are supposed to be for everyone,
right? Both kids and adults, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So Urara Santa has a present for you for being such a great trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara hands over ten colorful tickets that
say "I'll Help with Anything!" on them.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's cleaning up, making food, or being a
good listener, I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And you know I'll give it my all! Just holler
whenever you want to use one!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I gave these tickets to my dad when I was
younger, and it made him sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So I hope you like them just as much!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, my dad liked them so much,
he never spent any of them.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Don't just save them up forever, okay? You gotta
use them!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hm, good answer! Okay, let's get this party
started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I have a wonderful time with Haru
Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I have a present for you too! But I can't give it to
you today.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's super special and super big! I'm sure you're
gonna like it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heeheehee! Well, it's...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: First place in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be really tough, but I wanna win it for
you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If I know you're looking forward to my win, I think
it'll give me a reeeally big boost!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So can you wait just a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! It's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to Haru Urara's present for me.
After that, we continue to celebrate the holidays.
